title: Vera's Vanilla +
description:
Minecraft, but slightly better.

This is a modpack that i use personally and is intended to be updated after every official Minecraft version, i specifically chose mods that expand upon what is already available, without feeling like a massive overhaul.
body:
Minecraft, but slightly better.

This is a modpack that i use personally and is intended to be updated after every official Minecraft version, i specifically chose mods that expand upon what is already available, without feeling like a massive overhaul.

This project started in 1.21.7, however i will work on backporting it to older versions over time. the priority is always the newest version of minecraft however

Core Mods;
- [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite)
- [Armor Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-statues)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Connectible Chains](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectiblechains)
- [Diagonal Windows/Diagonal Walls/Diagonal Fences](https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs)
- [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores)
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium)
- [Macaw's Mods (Doors, Fences & Walls, Lights & Lamps, Paintings, Paths & Pavings, Roofs, Stairs & Balconies, Trapdoors, Windows)](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw/mods)
- [More Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims)
- [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)
- [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)

"Core Mods" will be included in every future version the modpack, but they may not be available in backports

Non-Core Mods may also persist through different versions, but they may be removed/replaced depending on their availability for a specific version of the game, or if a better alternative is released
